mnemonics.title: SARSA Meaning
mnemonics.content: S-A-R-S-A: State-Action-Reward-State-Action - Remember the sequence used in the update: current state and action lead to reward and next state, then next action is chosen for the update.

mnemonics.title: On-Policy vs Off-Policy
mnemonics.content: SARSA = Same Policy (On-policy): The 'A' in SARSA is actually sampled, same policy chooses both current and next action. Q-Learning = Questions Actions (Off-policy): Uses max, doesn't care what policy is used.

mnemonics.title: When to Use SARSA
mnemonics.content: SARSA = Safety And Risk-Sensitive Approach - Use when exploration is risky, actions have consequences, or you need conservative policies.

mnemonics.title: Expected SARSA
mnemonics.content: Expected = Average = Stable - Expected SARSA averages over all possible next actions, reducing variance and providing more stable learning than the standard version.

mnemonics.title: Update Rule Components
mnemonics.content: Alpha Gamma Reward State Action: α (alpha) for learning rate, γ (gamma) for discount, the reward r connects states, and both s' and a' matter for SARSA.
